sentences.arabic: فِي الْمَشْهَدِ الْمُعَاصِرِ لِوَسَائِلِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ، يُمَثِّلُ صُعُودُ "الْمُؤَثِّرِينَ" تَحَوُّلًا مِحْوَرِيًّا فِي دِينَامِيَّاتِ السُّلْطَةِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ وَرَأْسِ الْمَالِ الثَّقَافِيِّ.
sentences.translation: U savremenom pejzažu društvenih mreža, uspon 'influensera' predstavlja ključni zaokret u dinamici društvene moći i kulturnog kapitala.
sentences.translationEn: In the contemporary landscape of social media, the rise of 'influencers' marks a pivotal shift in the dynamics of social authority and cultural capital.

sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ هَذِهِ الشَّخْصِيَّاتُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ عَلَى صِيَاغَةِ هَالَةٍ مِنَ الْمِصْدَاقِيَّةِ، هِيَ فِي آنٍ وَاحِدٍ مَصْنُوعَةٌ بِدِقَّةٍ وَمَعْرُوضَةٌ بِعَفْوِيَّةٍ ظَاهِرِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove digitalne ličnosti rade na oblikovanju aure autentičnosti koja je istovremeno precizno izrađena i prikazana s prividnom spontanošću.
sentences.translationEn: These digital personas cultivate an aura of authenticity that is simultaneously meticulously manufactured and projected with apparent spontaneity.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ خِلَالِ عَدَسَةِ الْهَاتِفِ الذَّكِيِّ، تُرْتَقَى التَّفَاصِيلُ الرَّتِيبَةُ لِلْحَيَاةِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ إِلَى مَرْتَبَةِ الِاسْتِعْرَاضِ، مِمَّا يَمْحُو الْفَوَاصِلَ بَيْنَ الْوَاقِعِ وَالْأَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Kroz objektiv pametnog telefona, monotoni detalji svakodnevnog života uzdižu se na nivo spektakla, brišući granice između stvarnosti i performansa.
sentences.translationEn: Through the lens of a smartphone, the mundane details of daily life are elevated to the status of a spectacle, blurring the lines between reality and performance.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّفَاعُلُ "شِبْهُ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ" يُنَمِّي شُعُورًا بِالْأُلْفَةِ لَدَى الْمَلَايِينِ، لَكِنَّهُ يَبْقَى عَلَاقَةً أَحَادِيَّةَ الْجَانِبِ تَقُومُ عَلَى الِاسْتِهْلَاكِ.
sentences.translation: Ova 'parasocijalna' interakcija njeguje osjećaj bliskosti kod miliona ljudi, ali ostaje jednostran odnos zasnovan na potrošnji.
sentences.translationEn: This 'parasocial' interaction fosters a sense of intimacy among millions, yet it remains a one-sided relationship predicated on consumption.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّأْثِيرَ الَّذِي يُمَارِسُهُ هَؤُلَاءِ الصُّنَّاعُ لَيْسَ جَمَالِيًّا فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ يَمْتَدُّ إِلَى جَوْهَرِ السُّلُوكِ الِاسْتِهْلَاكِيِّ وَتَشْكِيلِ الْأَيْدِيُولُوجِيَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Uticaj koji ovi kreatori vrše nije samo estetski, već se proteže do same suštine potrošačkog ponašanja i formiranja ideologija.
sentences.translationEn: The influence wielded by these creators is not merely aesthetic but extends to the very core of consumer behavior and ideological formation.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، فَإِنَّهُ تَحْتَ قِشْرَةِ الْمِثَالِيَّةِ الْمُنَقَّاةِ، يَقْبَعُ سُوقُ عَمَلٍ مَحْفُوفٌ بِالْمَخَاطِرِ، تُحَرِّكُهُ أَهْوَاءُ الْخَوَارِزْمِيَّاتِ الْمُتَقَلِّبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, ispod kore pročišćenog idealizma krije se nesigurno tržište rada, pokretano hirovima promjenljivih algoritama.
sentences.translationEn: However, beneath the veneer of filtered perfection lies a precarious labor market driven by the whims of ever-changing algorithms.

sentences.arabic: وَبَيْنَمَا يَتَطَوَّرُ الِاقْتِصَادُ الرَّقْمِيُّ، يَبْقَى التَّحَدِّي مَكْمُونًا فِي التَّمْيِيزِ بَيْنَ التَّوَاصُلِ الْإِنْسَانِيِّ الْحَقِيقِيِّ وَتَسْلِيعِ الذَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Dok se digitalna ekonomija razvija, izazov ostaje u razlikovanju istinske ljudske povezanosti od komodifikacije sopstva.
sentences.translationEn: As the digital economy evolves, the challenge remains to discern between genuine human connection and the commodification of the self.
